title: Sprout Hat
description: You wanted to feel like a sprout? With these resource packs, you can.
body:
**For correct work you need Optifine or CITResewn** 

Rename Carved Pumpkin to `Sprout`.

![Sprout on player](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/r62tZwe8/images/a49201f8e00c98c036f33d35e46556a22777ad86.png)
